mapper.update:
update roomtable
rname = #{rname},
raddress = #{raddress},
rtelnum = #{rtelnum},
rpostcode = #{rpostcode},
where room_id = #{room_id}
mapper.select:
select * from roomtable where rname = #{rname}
and room_id != #{room_id}

select * from roomtable where ""=""
and concat(room_id) like concat('%',#{room_id},'%')
and concat(rname) like concat('%',#{rname},'%')
and concat(raddress) like concat('%',#{raddress},'%')
and concat(rtelnum) like concat('%',#{rtelnum},'%')
and concat(rpostcode) like concat('%',#{rpostcode},'%')
